description_long: This handcart features a rectangular, deep metal tray with slightly raised side rails and a weathered blue finish. The cart is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels with metal rims, positioned centrally on either side of the frame. A long, straight wooden handle extends from the front, designed for pulling or pushing the cart. The tray is bordered by vertical posts at each corner, providing additional structural support and helping to contain loads. The overall construction suggests durability and utility, suitable for transporting goods or materials in an urban environment. The combination of wood and metal gives the cart a classic, utilitarian appearance.
description: A blue, metal handcart with a deep tray, wooden spoked wheels, and a long wooden handle. Raised side rails and sturdy construction make it ideal for carrying loads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow end of the tray and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, blue tray, and extended handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back panel and both wheels partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the second wheel and the handle extending outward.
